title: Tragedy as National Park Service ranger falls to her death while working on idyllic Alaskan mountain
description: Washington state native Robin Pendery fatally fell while on a climbing patrol on Mount McKinley in Alaska.
content:
A National Park Service ranger plummeted to her death while on duty atop an idyllic Alaskan mountain.
Robin Pendery fatally fell into a crevasse on Mount McKinley on Thursday afternoon, officials sa… [+3342 chars]
de: Tragödie: Die Rangerin des National Park Service stürzt bei der Arbeit auf dem idyllischen Berg Alaskas in den Tod. Der aus dem US-Bundesstaat Washington stammende Robin Pendery stürzte bei einer Kletterpatrouille am Mount McKinley in Alaska tödlich.
en: Tragedy as National Park Service ranger falls to her death while working on idyllic Alaskan mountain. Washington state native Robin Pendery fatally fell while on a climbing patrol on Mount McKinley in Alaska.
la: Tragoedia in National Park Service vagans ad mortem cadit dum in monte idyllico Alaskan laborat. Status Batavorum indigena Robin Pendery letaliter cecidit dum in circuitu scandens in Monte McKinley in Alaska.

title: The fastest human-powered Everest ascent from sea level
description: Avalanches, altitude sickness, orcs and Justin Bieber — a Brisbane mountaineer is believed to have set a new world record on Mount Everest for charity, despite every obstacle thrown his way.
content:
Brisbane man Oliver Foran set out to break the record for the fastest human-powered ascent of Everest from sea-level.(Supplied)

de: Der schnellste von Menschenhand durchgeführte Everest-Aufstieg vom Meeresspiegel aus. Lawinen, Höhenkrankheit, Orks und Justin Bieber – ein Bergsteiger aus Brisbane soll trotz aller Hindernisse für wohltätige Zwecke einen neuen Weltrekord auf dem Mount Everest aufgestellt haben.
en: The fastest human-powered Everest ascent from sea level. Avalanches, altitude sickness, orcs and Justin Bieber — a Brisbane mountaineer is believed to have set a new world record on Mount Everest for charity, despite every obstacle thrown his way.
la: Celerrimus hominum potentiae Everestis ascensus a gradu maris. Avalanches, altitudo morbi, Orci et Justin Bieber — montanus Brisbane novum mundum in Monte Everesto pro charitate posuisse creditur, quamvis obvium omne objecisset.

title: Ex-Avalanche Forward Jack Drury Lands Massive Five-Year Deal in Nashville
description: Just days after being traded by the Colorado Avalanche, Jack Drury turned his move to Nashville into a five-year, $22.5 million contract.
content: Jack Drury has spent the past several days in the Bahamas enjoying a well-earned vacation with his family. Judging by the smiles in the photos circulating on social media, it's safe to say life has b… [+3395 chars]
de: Ex-Avalanche-Stürmer Jack Drury erhält massiven Fünfjahresvertrag in Nashville. Nur wenige Tage nach seinem Wechsel zur Colorado Avalanche wandelte Jack Drury seinen Wechsel nach Nashville in einen Fünfjahresvertrag über 22,5 Millionen US-Dollar um.
en: Ex-Avalanche Forward Jack Drury Lands Massive Five-Year Deal in Nashville. Just days after being traded by the Colorado Avalanche, Jack Drury turned his move to Nashville into a five-year, $22.5 million contract.
la: Ex-Avalanche Forward Jack Drury Lands Massive Quinque-Annus Fac in Nashville. Paucis diebus postquam Colorado Avalanche negotiatus est, Jack Drury suum motum ad Nashville convertit in quinquennium, $22.5 miliones contractum.
